title: UiPreviewMessageTabDef - Metadata API
description: Represents the registration of a custom Marketing Cloud Preview and Test modal tab, created using custom Lightning web components. You can register and show multiple tabs in the Preview and Test experience.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the tab is enabled and is customer controlled (true) or not (false).

isProtected.description: Indicates whether the configuration is protected (true) or not (false).

lightningComponentDef.description: The customer-created Lightning web component that displays in the Preview and Test tabs.

supportedChannel.description: A string indicating the type of channel.Values are: Email Sms WhatsApp

tabName.description: The case-sensitive, user-defined label displayed as the name of the tab. Maximum length is 255 characters.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="SupportedChannel">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Email"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Sms"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="WhatsApp"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Rcs"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="UiPreviewMessageTabDef">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="isActive" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isProtected" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="label" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="lightningComponentDef" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="supportedChannel" type="tns:SupportedChannel"/>
        <xsd:element name="tabName" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: This example is a custom Lightning web component’s HTML file.
This example package.xml references the component’s definition.
